build: mainnet private beta v2 — graduates to REAL Uniswap V2 (DexScreener/bot-trackable), betaMode allowlist, 0.001 ETH cap
notes: MAINNET private beta v2. Tokens graduate to REAL Uniswap V2 → appear on DexScreener + are bot-trackable AFTER graduation (pre-graduation they live on the bonding curve, like pump.fun before Raydium). betaMode ON — only the allowlisted wallet creates/trades; per-token cap 0.001 ETH. Admin/owner/treasury = the deployer 0xA49dc277 (this key was exposed during setup — rotate to a fresh/multisig before scaling). Go public: factory.setBetaMode(false).
